# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository follows C.A.S.A - Context, Architecture, Stack & Automation.

## General rules

- Use `.casa` as the source of truth.
- Keep global suggestions aligned with `AGENTS.md`.
- Prefer existing examples before creating new patterns.
- Do not suggest edits to generated adapter files.
- Suggest tests, docs and contract updates when behavior changes.

## Completion

Changes should be compatible with `npm run check`.
